holdings.name: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

raw.n: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

holdings.n: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

overview.description: The Franklin U.S Core Bond ETF (FLCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed fund that holds US investment-grade bonds, including Treasurys, MBS and investment-grade corporate bonds. Managers aim for similar risk traits to the Bloomberg U.S FLCB was launched on Sep 17, 2019 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
